summary: Your recovery markers are strong today: Nightly Recharge is 5 of 6 and HRV is 70 ms, both well above your 7-day baselines (3.7 and 63 ms), which signals your nervous system is well-recovered. The one soft spot is sleep — 5.4 hours is nearly an hour under your weekly average. Your body is primed, so this is a green light to train hard today and hit a demanding session while the readiness is there. Just bank the recovery on the back end: protect tonight's sleep with an earlier wind-down to keep this trend going, and don't stack a second hard day on top if tonight comes up short again.
